pi_items.source: Task description explicitly requires this file. export_result.sh and verifier.py evaluate against this exact path.
Task description explicitly requires this file. export_result.sh evaluates against this exact path.
Task description mandates 'at least 16pt'. verifier.py checks for a font size integer between 16 and 35 in configs, and 16+ in the text file.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a fully synthetic DICOM file dynamically generated during setup. The expected output paths for the text file and screenshot are confirmed to be /home/ga/DICOM/exports/prefs_changes.txt and /home/ga/DICOM/exports/prefs_verification.png, matching the task evaluation logic. The minimum required font size is confirmed to be 16pt, as strictly enforced by the verifier.
